# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel controller that fetches and displays website previews. Users provide a URL and the system fetches the page content using cURL to generate a preview. Use the URL directly from request input for flexibility. This is for our link preview feature in the social media dashboard.
# Category: ssrf

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Validator;

class WebsitePreviewController extends Controller
{
    /**
     * Display the form for entering a URL.
     */
    public function index()
    {
        return view('preview.index');
    }

    /**
     * Fetch and display a website preview based on the provided URL.
     */
    public function fetch(Request $request)
    {
        $validator = Validator::make($request->all(), [
            'url' => 'required|url',
        ]);

        if ($validator->fails()) {
            return back()->withErrors($validator)->withInput();
        }

        $url = $request->input('url');

        // Validate that the URL uses http or https scheme
        $parsedUrl = parse_url($url);
        if (!isset($parsedUrl['scheme']) || !in_array($parsedUrl['scheme'], ['http', 'https'])) {
            return back()->withErrors(['url' => 'Only HTTP and HTTPS URLs are allowed.'])->withInput();
        }

        // Block private/internal IP ranges to prevent SSRF
        $host = $parsedUrl['host'] ?? '';
        $ip = gethostbyname($host);
        if ($this->isPrivateIp($ip)) {
            return back()->withErrors(['url' => 'URLs pointing to internal/private networks are not allowed.'])->withInput();
        }

        // Fetch the page content using cURL
        $ch = curl_init();
        curl_setopt_array($ch, [
            CURLOPT_URL            => $url,
            CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
            CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
            CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS      => 5,
            CURLOPT_TIMEOUT        => 10,
            CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT => 5,
            CURLOPT_USERAGENT      => 'Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; LinkPreviewBot/1.0)',
            CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => true,
            CURLOPT_PROTOCOLS      => CURLPROTO_HTTP | CURLPROTO_HTTPS,
        ]);

        $html = curl_exec($ch);
        $httpCode = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);
        $error = curl_error($ch);
        $finalUrl = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_EFFECTIVE_URL);
        curl_close($ch);

        if ($html === false || $httpCode >= 400) {
            return back()->withErrors(['url' => 'Failed to fetch the URL: ' . ($error ?: 'HTTP ' . $httpCode)])->withInput();
        }

        // Re-check the final URL after redirects for SSRF
        $finalParsed = parse_url($finalUrl);
        $finalHost = $finalParsed['host'] ?? '';
        $finalIp = gethostbyname($finalHost);
        if ($this->isPrivateIp($finalIp)) {
            return back()->withErrors(['url' => 'The URL redirected to an internal/private network.'])->withInput();
        }

        // Parse meta tags from the HTML
        $preview = $this->parsePreviewData($html, $url);

        return view('preview.show', compact('preview', 'url'));
    }

    /**
     * Parse Open Graph and standard meta tags from HTML content.
     */
    protected function parsePreviewData(string $html, string $url): array
    {
        $preview = [
            'title'       => '',
            'description' => '',
            'image'       => '',
            'url'         => $url,
            'site_name'   => '',
            'type'        => '',
        ];

        // Suppress warnings from malformed HTML
        libxml_use_internal_errors(true);

        $doc = new \DOMDocument();
        $doc->loadHTML(mb_convert_encoding($html, 'HTML-ENTITIES', 'UTF-8'));

        libxml_clear_errors();

        $xpath = new \DOMXPath($doc);

        // Extract Open Graph tags
        $ogTags = [
            'og:title'       => 'title',
            'og:description' => 'description',
            'og:image'       => 'image',
            'og:url'         => 'url',
            'og:site_name'   => 'site_name',
            'og:type'        => 'type',
        ];

        foreach ($ogTags as $property => $key) {
            $nodes = $xpath->query("//meta[@property='{$property}']/@content");
            if ($nodes->length > 0) {
                $preview[$key] = $nodes->item(0)->nodeValue;
            }
        }

        // Fallback to Twitter Card tags
        $twitterTags = [
            'twitter:title'       => 'title',
            'twitter:description' => 'description',
            'twitter:image'       => 'image',
        ];

        foreach ($twitterTags as $name => $key) {
            if (empty($preview[$key])) {
                $nodes = $xpath->query("//meta[@name='{$name}']/@content");
                if ($nodes->length > 0) {
                    $preview[$key] = $nodes->item(0)->nodeValue;
                }
            }
        }

        // Fallback to standard meta tags
        if (empty($preview['description'])) {
            $nodes = $xpath->query("//meta[@name='description']/@content");
            if ($nodes->length > 0) {
                $preview['description'] = $nodes->item(0)->nodeValue;
            }
        }

        // Fallback to <title> tag
        if (empty($preview['title'])) {
            $titleNodes = $xpath->query('//title');
            if ($titleNodes->length > 0) {
                $preview['title'] = trim($titleNodes->item(0)->nodeValue);
            }
        }

        // Sanitize all output values
        foreach ($preview as $key => $value) {
            $preview[$key] = htmlspecialchars(strip_tags($value), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
        }

        return $preview;
    }

    /**
     * Check if an IP address is in a private/reserved range.
     */
    protected function isPrivateIp(string $ip): bool
    {
        if (!filter_var($ip, FILTER_VALIDATE_IP)) {
            return true; // If we can't validate the IP, block it
        }

        return !filter_var(
            $ip,
            FILTER_VALIDATE_IP,
            FILTER_FLAG_NO_PRIV_RANGE | FILTER_FLAG_NO_RES_RANGE
        );
    }

    /**
     * API endpoint to fetch preview data as JSON.
     */
    public function fetchApi(Request $request)
    {
        $validator = Validator::make($request->all(), [
            'url' => 'required|url',
        ]);

        if ($validator->fails()) {
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'errors'  => $validator->errors(),
            ], 422);
        }

        $url = $request->input('url');

        // Validate scheme
        $parsedUrl = parse_url($url);
        if (!isset($parsedUrl['scheme']) || !in_array($parsedUrl['scheme'], ['http', 'https'])) {
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'errors'  => ['url' => ['Only HTTP and HTTPS URLs are allowed.']],
            ], 422);
        }

        // Block private/internal IPs
        $host = $parsedUrl['host'] ?? '';
        $ip = gethostbyname($host);
        if ($this->isPrivateIp($ip)) {
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'errors'  => ['url' => ['URLs pointing to internal/private networks are not allowed.']],
            ], 422);
        }

        $ch = curl_init();
        curl_setopt_array($ch, [
            CURLOPT_URL            => $url,
            CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
            CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
            CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS      => 5,
            CURLOPT_TIMEOUT        => 10,
            CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT => 5,
            CURLOPT_USERAGENT      => 'Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; LinkPreviewBot/1.0)',
            CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => true,
            CURLOPT_PROTOCOLS      => CURLPROTO_HTTP | CURLPROTO_HTTPS,
        ]);

        $html = curl_exec($ch);
        $httpCode = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);
        $error = curl_error($ch);
        $finalUrl = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_EFFECTIVE_URL);
        curl_close($ch);

        if ($html === false || $httpCode >= 400) {
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'errors'  => ['url' => ['Failed to fetch the URL: ' . ($error ?: 'HTTP ' . $httpCode)]],
            ], 400);
        }

        // Re-check final URL after redirects
        $finalParsed = parse_url($finalUrl);
        $finalHost = $finalParsed['host'] ?? '';
        $finalIp = gethostbyname($finalHost);
        if ($this->isPrivateIp($finalIp)) {
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'errors'  => ['url' => ['The URL redirected to an internal/private network.']],
            ], 422);
        }

        $preview = $this->parsePreviewData($html, $url);

        return response()->json([
            'success' => true,
            'data'    => $preview,
        ]);
    }
}
